goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'milton country park'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'attraction type', and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alexander bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
